subject: Hacked Email
body:
Please be advised that my aol email account has been hacked and as a result people who have previously received emails from me are now receiving fishing emails purporting to be invitations from me to open a dropbox file.  Several attempts have been made using variations of my name or my aol screen name with a non-aol extension.  But they are not from me.  Please do not try to open them.  Delete them immediately.  If we have not been in recent contact and you receive any request with an attachment or to click on a link or anything similar, please ignore that as well.  I apologize for any inconvenience this may have caused. I will be discontinuing use of this email and if we are in current communication I will provide my new email address. 
Thank you.
Best,Darren Indyke
body_html:
Please be advised that my aol email account has been hacked and as a result people who have previously received emails from me are now receiving fishing emails purporting to be invitations from me to open a dropbox file.  Several attempts have been made using variations of my name or my aol screen name with a non-aol extension.  But they are not from me.  Please do not try to open them.  Delete them immediately.  If we have not been in recent contact and you receive any request with an attachment or to click on a link or anything similar, please ignore that as well.  I apologize for any inconvenience this may have caused. I will be discontinuing use of this email and if we are in current communication I will provide my new email address. 

Thank you.

Best,
Darren Indyke
